text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're here for the Kinko Sho.
Matikanefukukitaru, our rival for today, arrives at
the scene decked out head-to-toe in lucky goods.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inspired by Mihono Bourbon, she refers to herself
as "Full Armor Fukukitaru." However, this is far
from being a joke.
